### Branch Naming Convention

The repository has inconsistent branch naming patterns:

- `agent-{timestamp}` - Agent-generated branches
- `{agent}/{description}` - Agent-specific branches
- `{type}/{description}` - Traditional branch naming

**Recommendation**: Standardize on `{agent}/{description}-{date}` format for better organization.
